## Source: amazon-inspector (e2a95b0b5cbb552848c3740a99b78d968f3cef00df645e9314604255a4f0507d)
The package @molb-prelogin/gobiz-config was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (7a5fd2e949ef4713d1e2320c71cfddd01ab5ad6ca2135eee14bb81a6ce35c674)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@molb-prelogin/gobiz-config' @ 199.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
